response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed video, identified 'Prism Melody' and 'Sush1' as the composer/artist from on-screen credits. Performed search for 'Prism Melody Hololive lyrics' to obtain Japanese lyrics and English translations. Confirmed skit segments (00:00-02:12) have no vocal singing.
response.global_summary: The video begins with a promotional skit featuring various Hololive production VTubers, followed by a musical performance of the song 'Prism Melody' by several Hololive members as part of a special stage presentation.

scenes.description: A promotional skit featuring multiple Hololive VTubers, including scenes in an office setting and a car chase, focusing on Coca-Cola product placement.
A musical performance on a stage with various Hololive VTubers, with on-screen text identifying the song as 'Prism Melody'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
そうさ ずっと僕らの奇跡が
途切れないように歌うんだ
もっと高く 大きな声で
聞こえてた？何かが始まるサイン
集まって気付けば 和音を奏でた
夢に見るだけ...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Yes, our miracle will last forever...
Let's sing so it doesn't break
Even higher! With a loud voice
Could you hear it? A sign that something is starting
When we gathered, we noticed we were playing a harmony
Dreaming...

scenes.description: A musical performance on a stage with various Hololive VTubers, with on-screen text identifying the song as 'Prism Melody'.
